domains.name: Authentication & User Management
domains.description: User registration, login, social OAuth, 2FA, password management, profile settings, onboarding, and account security.

domains.name: Course Management & Learning
domains.description: Course catalog, enrollment, lessons, tasks, quizzes, progress tracking, notes, and learning path recommendations.

domains.name: Assessment & Evaluation
domains.description: Bloom's Taxonomy tiered assessments, adaptive question selection, grading, mastery tracking, and analytics.

domains.name: Gamification
domains.description: XP system, levels, badges, leaderboard rankings, real-time updates, point decay, and A/B testing of reward variants.

domains.name: Challenges
domains.description: Cryptography challenges with scoring, daily challenge rotation, and submission tracking.

domains.name: Labs & Simulations
domains.description: Interactive client-side cryptography simulations (Caesar, Vigenère, etc.) with visit tracking.

domains.name: Certificates
domains.description: Course completion certificates with generation, listing, and public verification.

domains.name: Admin Panel
domains.description: Content management (courses, lessons, tasks, assessments, users), system stats, and audit logging.

domains.name: Daily Rewards & Engagement
domains.description: Daily login rewards, streak tracking, notifications, and re-engagement mechanisms.

flows.name: User Registration
flows.description: New user signs up via email or social OAuth, completes onboarding.

steps.name: Visit Register Page
steps.description: User navigates to registration page.

steps.name: Submit Registration Form
steps.description: Form data validated and user created via Fortify CreateNewUser action.

steps.name: Social OAuth Alternative
steps.description: User chooses GitHub/Google login instead, redirected to provider.

steps.name: Complete Onboarding
steps.description: New user goes through onboarding flow to set preferences.

flows.name: User Login
flows.description: Existing user authenticates via credentials or social OAuth, optionally with 2FA.

steps.name: Visit Login Page
steps.description: User navigates to login form.

steps.name: Authenticate Credentials
steps.description: Fortify validates credentials with rate limiting.

steps.name: 2FA Challenge
steps.description: If 2FA enabled, user must provide TOTP code or recovery code.

steps.name: Redirect to Dashboard
steps.description: Authenticated user lands on personalized dashboard.

flows.name: Account Security Management
flows.description: User manages password, 2FA, and linked social accounts.

steps.name: Open Security Settings
steps.description: User navigates to security settings page.

steps.name: Change Password
steps.description: User updates password with validation.

steps.name: Enable/Disable 2FA
steps.description: User enables TOTP 2FA, scans QR code, confirms with code.

steps.name: Link/Unlink Social Accounts
steps.description: User connects or disconnects OAuth providers.

flows.name: Course Enrollment & Learning
flows.description: User browses courses, enrolls, progresses through lessons and tasks.

steps.name: Browse Course Catalog
steps.description: User views available courses with filtering/search.

steps.name: View Course Detail
steps.description: User sees course overview, lessons, and requirements.

steps.name: Enroll in Course
steps.description: User enrolls, creating enrollment record.

steps.name: Complete Lesson Tasks
steps.description: User works through read/code/video tasks within lessons.

steps.name: Take Lesson Quiz
steps.description: User answers quiz questions for knowledge check.

steps.name: Complete Lesson
steps.description: All tasks done, lesson marked complete, XP awarded, events fired.

steps.name: Complete Course
steps.description: All lessons done, course completion event fired.

flows.name: Personalized Learning Path
flows.description: System recommends next courses/lessons based on progress and mastery.

steps.name: Analyze User Progress
steps.description: System evaluates completed courses, mastery levels, and gaps.

steps.name: Generate Recommendations
steps.description: Learning path builder creates ordered recommendations.

steps.name: Display Learning Path
steps.description: User sees personalized path on dashboard.

flows.name: Study Notes
flows.description: User creates, manages, and exports study notes linked to lessons.

steps.name: Create Note
steps.description: User writes a note while studying a lesson.

steps.name: Manage & Export Notes
steps.description: User views, edits, deletes, or exports notes.

flows.name: Assessment Attempt
flows.description: User takes a Bloom's Taxonomy assessment with adaptive questions and receives graded results.

steps.name: Start Assessment
steps.description: User initiates assessment, submission record created.

steps.name: Receive Adaptive Questions
steps.description: System selects questions based on user's performance level.

steps.name: Answer Questions
steps.description: User submits answers at various Bloom's levels.

steps.name: Grade Submission
steps.description: AssessmentGradingService scores using Bloom's rubrics.

steps.name: Update Mastery Level
steps.description: MasteryService updates user's topic mastery based on results.

flows.name: XP Award & Level Up
flows.description: User earns XP from activities, potentially levels up and earns badges.

steps.name: Complete Activity
steps.description: User completes lesson, challenge, or assessment triggering XP.

steps.name: Calculate XP Amount
steps.description: XpService determines points based on activity type and config.

steps.name: Award XP
steps.description: XP added to user, XpAwarded event fired.

steps.name: Check Level Up
steps.description: LevelService checks if XP crosses level threshold.

steps.name: Check Badge Criteria
steps.description: BadgeService evaluates if new badges are earned.

steps.name: Update Leaderboard
steps.description: LeaderboardService recalculates rankings, broadcasts update.

flows.name: Leaderboard View
flows.description: User views real-time XP rankings with WebSocket updates.

steps.name: Load Leaderboard
steps.description: Controller fetches cached rankings from LeaderboardService.

steps.name: Render Rankings
steps.description: Frontend displays leaderboard with user positions.

steps.name: Subscribe to Real-Time Updates
steps.description: React hook connects to Reverb WebSocket channel for live updates.

flows.name: Point Decay (Inactive Users)
flows.description: Scheduled process warns and decays XP for inactive users.

steps.name: Send Decay Warning
steps.description: Scheduled command notifies users about upcoming point decay.

steps.name: Decay Inactive Points
steps.description: Scheduled command reduces XP for users inactive beyond threshold.

flows.name: Challenge Attempt
flows.description: User attempts a cryptography challenge and receives score.

steps.name: Browse Challenges
steps.description: User views available challenges by difficulty/topic.

steps.name: Solve Challenge
steps.description: User submits answers to challenge questions.

steps.name: Score Submission
steps.description: ChallengeScoreService evaluates correctness and timing.

steps.name: Fire ChallengeSolved Event
steps.description: Event triggers XP award and badge checks.

flows.name: Daily Challenge Rotation
flows.description: System rotates daily challenge via scheduled command.

steps.name: Rotate Daily Challenge
steps.description: Scheduled command selects new daily challenge.

flows.name: Lab Simulation
flows.description: User interacts with client-side cryptography simulations.

steps.name: Browse Labs
steps.description: User views available lab simulations.

steps.name: Open Lab Simulation
steps.description: User enters interactive lab, visit tracked.

steps.name: Run Cipher Simulation
steps.description: User experiments with cipher algorithms client-side.

flows.name: Certificate Generation & Verification
flows.description: Certificate issued on course completion, publicly verifiable.

steps.name: Course Completed
steps.description: User finishes all course requirements.

steps.name: Generate Certificate
steps.description: Certificate created with unique verification code.

steps.name: Public Verification
steps.description: Anyone can verify certificate authenticity via public URL.

flows.name: Content Management
flows.description: Admin creates and manages courses, lessons, tasks, and assessments.

steps.name: Admin Authorization
steps.description: CheckAdmin middleware verifies admin role.

steps.name: Manage Courses
steps.description: Admin creates, edits, reorders, publishes courses.

steps.name: Manage Lessons
steps.description: Admin creates and organizes lessons within courses.

steps.name: Manage Tasks
steps.description: Admin adds read/code/video tasks to lessons.

steps.name: Manage Assessments
steps.description: Admin creates Bloom's Taxonomy assessments and questions.

steps.name: Content Processing
steps.description: Uploaded documents/videos processed via queue jobs.

flows.name: User Management
flows.description: Admin manages users, roles, and views system stats.

steps.name: Manage Users
steps.description: Admin lists users, updates roles, removes accounts.

steps.name: View System Stats
steps.description: Admin sees platform-wide statistics.

steps.name: Audit Logging
steps.description: Admin actions logged for accountability.

flows.name: Daily Reward Claim
flows.description: User claims daily login reward to maintain streak.

steps.name: View Available Rewards
steps.description: User sees daily reward calendar and current streak.

steps.name: Claim Daily Reward
steps.description: User claims reward, streak incremented, XP/bonus granted.

flows.name: Notifications
flows.description: User receives and manages notifications about achievements, decay warnings, etc.

steps.name: Receive Notification
steps.description: System sends notification (badge earned, decay warning, etc.).

steps.name: View & Dismiss Notifications
steps.description: User reads and marks notifications as read.

flows.name: Feature Flags & Experiments
flows.description: Platform uses Pennant feature flags for gradual rollouts and A/B testing.

steps.name: Define Feature Flag
steps.description: Class-based feature flags defined in app/Features/.

steps.name: Evaluate Flag for User
steps.description: ExperimentService checks flag state scoped to user.
